error_signature: Node has no access to credential
title: Telegram Trigger node lacks access to credentials
symptom: The Telegram Trigger node receives messages but fails with 'Node has no access to credential', halting workflow execution.
applies_when: Workflow is set up with credentials
not_this_if: Credentials are correctly shared with the workflow's project
root_cause: The error occurs when the workflow and the credential are in different projects, preventing the node from accessing the specified credential. This can happen if the credential was created in a project that the workflow does not have access to.
fix_steps: Check the sharing settings of the Telegram credential
Ensure the credential is shared with the project containing the workflow
agent_instruction: Verify and adjust the sharing settings of the Telegram credential to ensure access from the workflow's project.
